page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9it.8xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs, utilizing the Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at a clock speed of 3.2 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each vCPU maps directly to a physical core without hyperthreading, ensuring dedicated compute resources.

The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 28 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

The lack of hyperthreading provides predictable single-threaded execution performance per vCPU, though it limits the total concurrent thread count compared to hyperthreaded alternatives. The absence of local storage and GPUs makes this instance type best suited for workloads that rely on external storage and do not require hardware acceleration. Suitable workloads include general-purpose applications, web serving, enterprise application hosting, and database nodes utilizing network storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9it.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 32 dedicated vCPUs and 32 physical cores on an x86_64 Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at 3.2 GHz. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, it provides 128.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio. The instance lacks local storage and integrated GPUs, requiring network-attached storage for data persistence. It delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 28 Gbps. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, it offers predictable compute performance without hyperthreading overhead. This resource profile is designed for general-purpose workloads, enterprise applications, and web serving environments that utilize external block storage.

tagline: A dedicated thirty-two core Intel Xeon instance with balanced memory and twenty-eight Gbps network bandwidth for general-purpose workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 6982P-C at 3.2 GHz
128.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
28 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
Zero local storage requiring network-attached block storage solutions
No hyperthreading with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration for predictable execution
Designed for general-purpose applications, web serving, and enterprise workloads
